metadata.description: Mortgage workflow task roadmap for LOS import

subcategories.name: File Setup
subcategories.description: Initial loan setup and disclosure tasks

tasks.name: Review Credit
tasks.description: Review borrower credit report for accuracy and issues
tasks.notes: Comprehensive credit review including red flags, OFAC, fraud alerts, and lien verification
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied at loan application submission. Triggers when loan is created and borrower SSN is provided.

subtasks.name: Name Discrepancy
subtasks.description: Name Discrepancy � Review credit report for name discrepancies

subtasks.name: Name AKA's
subtasks.description: Name AKA's � Input AKA's listed on credit report

subtasks.name: Address Discrepancy
subtasks.description: Address Discrepancy � Review credit report for address discrepancies

subtasks.name: SSN Discrepancy
subtasks.description: SSN Discrepancy � Review credit report for Social Security Number discrepancies

subtasks.name: OFAC
subtasks.description: OFAC � Office of Foreign Assets Control screening for all parties

subtasks.name: Fraud Alerts
subtasks.description: Fraud Alerts � Review and address any fraud alerts on credit report

subtasks.name: Frozen Score
subtasks.description: Frozen Score � Identify and address frozen credit scores

subtasks.name: Review Liens
subtasks.description: Review Liens � Review liens and ensure they are tied to all VOMs (Verification of Mortgage)

tasks.name: Send Disclosures
tasks.description: Send required loan disclosures to borrower
tasks.notes: Includes index check, appraisal fee verification, FACT Act Disclosure review, and Home Counseling List
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied within 3 business days of loan application. Triggers after loan is created and borrower intent to proceed is confirmed.

subtasks.name: Index
subtasks.description: Index pulled as of today. Use 'Get Index' button.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Appraisal Fee Only
subtasks.description: The only fee evidenced is the appraisal fee.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: FACT Act Disclosure � All Scores
subtasks.description: All scores for all borrowers from all credit bureaus evidenced on FACT Act Disclosure.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: FACT Act Disclosure � Checkboxes
subtasks.description: Material Terms / Credit Score checkboxes checked when score available, unchecked when not.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: FACT Act Disclosure � Key Factors
subtasks.description: Key Factors text present for every credit score for all borrowers and bureaus.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: FACT Act Disclosure � eConsent
subtasks.description: eConsent received before sending electronically.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: FACT Act Disclosure � Contact Info
subtasks.description: Email and phone present before sending electronically.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: FACT Act Disclosure � Ready to Send
subtasks.description: Ready to Send Disclosure. Mark Done to send electronically. Mark Issue to send via mail.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Home Counseling List
subtasks.description: Provide Home Counseling List to borrower.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

tasks.name: Send Disclosures (HELOC)
tasks.description: Send required loan disclosures to borrower for HELOC loans
tasks.notes: HELOC variant � includes all standard disclosure subtasks plus demographic addendum checks
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied within 3 business days of HELOC loan application. Triggers after loan is created and borrower intent to proceed is confirmed.

subtasks.name: Program Selection
subtasks.description: Program Selection � Verify the program is marked appropriately for this loan.

subtasks.name: Index
subtasks.description: Index � Index pulled as of today. Use "Get Index" button.

subtasks.name: Plan Code
subtasks.description: Plan Code � Set Plan code to HELOC Adjustable (00007005)

subtasks.name: Appraisal Fee Only
subtasks.description: Appraisal Fee Only � The only fee evidenced is the appraisal fee.

subtasks.name: 1003 � Demographic HELOC
subtasks.description: 1003 � Demographic HELOC � Demographic information is collected only when the proceeds are used to pay off an existing lien-secured debt, qualifying the transaction as a refinancing for regulatory reporting purposes.

subtasks.name: FACT Act Disclosure � All Scores
subtasks.description: FACT Act Disclosure � All Scores � All scores for all borrowers from all credit bureaus pulled on the credit report are evidenced on the FACT Act Disclosure. (Be sure to check second borrower pair as well).

subtasks.name: FACT Act Disclosure � Checkboxes
subtasks.description: FACT Act Disclosure � Checkboxes � Ensure the 'Material Terms of Credit set by Credit Score' and 'Credit Score for Disclosure Notice' check boxes on the Disclosure Notice are checked when a credit score is available and unchecked when a score is not available.

subtasks.name: FACT Act Disclosure � Key Factors
subtasks.description: FACT Act Disclosure � Key Factors � Verify that the Key Factors informational text is present for every credit score to be disclosed for all borrowers and all bureaus pulled.

subtasks.name: Home Counseling List
subtasks.description: Home Counseling List � Import Home Counseling List

subtasks.name: Order AVM
subtasks.description: Order AVM � This subtask is completed automatically by the separate Order AVM task � do not complete manually.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when loan amount is at or below $400,000

subtasks.name: Flood Cert
subtasks.description: Flood Cert � This subtask is completed automatically upon completion of the separate Order Flood Certificate task � do not complete manually.

subtasks.name: eConsent
subtasks.description: eConsent � Verify eConsent is received before sending electronically.

subtasks.name: FACT Act Disclosure � Contact Info
subtasks.description: Contact Info � Verify email and phone are present before sending electronically.

subtasks.name: Ready to Send
subtasks.description: Ready to Send � Ready to Send Disclosure. Mark Done to send electronically. Mark Issue to send via mail (must complete manually).

tasks.name: Notice of Incomplete
tasks.description: Send Notice of Incomplete to borrower for missing application items
tasks.notes: Cleaned up from Example files/Notice of Incomplete.xml
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when borrower application is missing required items. Processor adds conditions and sends NOI electronically.

subtasks.name: Add Conditions
subtasks.description: Add conditions for NOI

subtasks.name: NOI Not Needed
subtasks.description: Mark N/A if an NOI is not needed; an underwriting decision will be produced soon.

subtasks.name: Send Notice of Incomplete
subtasks.description: Mark Done to send Notice of Incomplete electronically.

tasks.name: Mailing Initial Disclosures
tasks.description: Mail initial disclosure package when eConsent was not received on or before the disclosure due date
tasks.notes: Conditional task — only needed when eConsent was not obtained before the disclosure due date. Mark NA if eConsent was received and mailing is not needed.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when initial disclosures must be mailed because eConsent was not received on or before the due date of the disclosures.

subtasks.name: Mail Disclosures and Mark Disclosure Tracking
subtasks.description: Mail Disclosures and Mark Disclosure Tracking – Mail initial disclosure package to borrower and mark as mailed in disclosure tracking. Mark Done when complete. Mark NA if eConsent was obtained and mailing is not needed.

tasks.name: Order Appraisal
tasks.description: Order property appraisal and collect required forms
tasks.notes: Task can be reopened when new subtasks are assigned based on conditions
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after disclosures sent and appraisal fee collected. Triggers when property address is confirmed and borrower has signed appraisal authorization.

subtasks.name: Obtain Quote
subtasks.description: Obtain Quote � Obtain appraisal fee quote (conditional: property value over $1M or unique/complex property type)
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property value is over $1M or property is unique/complex

subtasks.name: Create Invoice
subtasks.description: Generate the appraisal invoice for the borrower to pay
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Send Invoice
subtasks.description: Send the appraisal invoice to the borrower
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when intent to proceed is received OR product is a HELOC

subtasks.name: Payment Recording
subtasks.description: Record appraisal payment received in Encompass and ValueLink (systems do not sync � must be entered in both separately)
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when appraisal payment is received

subtasks.name: Automated Order
subtasks.description: Place automated appraisal order via integrated system; marking Done will place the automated order
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when automated ordering is enabled/set up for this loan

subtasks.name: Order 1004
subtasks.description: Order 1004 appraisal form for single-family property
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property type is single-family AND automated ordering is not available

subtasks.name: Order 1025
subtasks.description: Order 1025 appraisal form for 2�4 unit property
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property type is 2�4 unit AND automated ordering is not available

subtasks.name: Order 1073
subtasks.description: Order 1073 appraisal form for condo property
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property type is condo AND automated ordering is not available

tasks.name: Order Title
tasks.description: Order title search and examination
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: title search request, preliminary title report review, exception review, lien verification, title commitment
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan is in processing. Triggers when property address is confirmed and purchase contract is received (for purchase loans) or after appraisal is ordered (for refinance).

subtasks.name: Order Title Ownership Report � Old Republic
subtasks.description: Order Title Ownership Report with Old Republic through their web portal
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when equity product and property is not in a trust

subtasks.name: Order Title Ownership Report � Equity Attorney (Trust)
subtasks.description: Order Title Ownership Report with designated equity product attorney; specify in order we are looking for a title rundown, trust review, and trustee cert preparation. No title insurance or closing services.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when equity product and property is in a trust

subtasks.name: Obtain Quote � New Deed Prep
subtasks.description: Obtain quote with selected bank attorney for new deed preparation
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property is not a purchase and title vesting on 1003 doesn't match

subtasks.name: Order Title � Bank Attorney
subtasks.description: Order title with selected bank attorney
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property is not an equity product

tasks.name: Order Flood Certificate
tasks.description: Determine if property is in flood zone and order flood insurance if required
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: FEMA flood zone determination, flood certificate review, flood insurance verification (if in zone), community participation verification
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after property address is confirmed. Triggers when appraisal is ordered or earlier if property details are available.

subtasks.name: Resubmit with Supporting Documents
subtasks.description: If flood determination fails, resubmit flood certificate request with supporting property documents
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when flood certificate determination fails

tasks.name: ARM Disclosure
tasks.description: Provide ARM-specific disclosures for adjustable rate mortgages
tasks.notes: Conditional task only for ARM loans
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied only for ARM loan products. Triggers when loan type is set to ARM/Adjustable Rate.

subtasks.name: Adjustable Rate Disclosure
subtasks.description: Provide ARM disclosure document to borrower
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when ARM disclosure task is created

subtasks.name: Consumer Handbook on ARM
subtasks.description: Provide CHARM booklet to borrower
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when ARM disclosure task is created

tasks.name: Credit Score Disclosure
tasks.description: Quality review and delivery of Credit Score Disclosure
tasks.notes: Assigned automatically when a credit report is pulled on a pre-approval or if a subsequent report is received on a live file. Processor reviews FACT Act disclosures for accuracy, verifies eConsent and contact info, then sends electronically (or via mail if Issue is marked). Grouped under Disclosures task group.
tasks.applicationLogic: Assigned automatically when a credit report is pulled on a pre-approval or when a subsequent credit report is received on a live file.

subtasks.name: FACT Act All Scores
subtasks.description: FACT Act All Scores � All scores for all borrowers from all credit bureaus pulled on the credit report are evidenced on the FACT Act Disclosure (be sure to check second borrower pair as well)
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: FACT Act Checkboxes
subtasks.description: FACT Act Checkboxes � Ensure the Material Terms of Credit set by Credit Score and Credit Score for Disclosure Notice check boxes on the Disclosure Notice are checked when a credit score is available and unchecked when a score is not available
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: FACT Act Key Factors
subtasks.description: FACT Act Key Factors � Verify that the Key Factors informational text is present for every credit score to be disclosed for all borrowers and all bureaus pulled
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: eConsent
subtasks.description: eConsent � Verify eConsent is received before sending electronically
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Contact Info
subtasks.description: Contact Info � Verify email and phone are present before sending electronically
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Ready to Send
subtasks.description: Ready to Send � Mark Done to send disclosure electronically; mark Issue to send via mail (must complete manually)
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

tasks.name: Withdraw Loan
tasks.description: Process loan withdrawal at borrower request
tasks.notes: Loan withdrawn by borrower. Includes Massachusetts-specific disclosures when applicable.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when borrower requests to withdraw application. Triggers when borrower cancels loan before closing.

subtasks.name: Borrower Withdrawal Documented
subtasks.description: Borrower's express withdrawal is documented in the conversation log; borrower must give clear indication they no longer wish to continue with the transaction

subtasks.name: Withdrawal Date Entered
subtasks.description: Enter the date the customer withdrew into the system, matching the date documented in correspondence; withdrawal letter must be sent within 3 business days of this date

subtasks.name: Send Withdrawal Notice
subtasks.description: Mark Done to send electronically to all borrowers; mark Issue to mail withdrawal letter

tasks.name: Send Denial
tasks.description: Send loan denial notice and adverse action disclosures
tasks.notes: Loan denied during processing. Includes Massachusetts-specific disclosures when applicable.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when loan is denied before underwriting submission. Triggers when processing determines loan cannot proceed to underwriting.

subtasks.name: MA Review Board Form
subtasks.description: Send Massachusetts Review Board form for appeals process
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property is located in Massachusetts

subtasks.name: ECOA Right to Copy of Appraisal
subtasks.description: Send ECOA notice of right to receive copy of appraisal
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property is located in Massachusetts

subtasks.name: Massachusetts MGL Disclosure
subtasks.description: Send Massachusetts General Laws disclosure
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property is located in Massachusetts

subtasks.name: Credit Score Disclosure
subtasks.description: Provide credit score disclosure with adverse action notice
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when credit report was pulled during application process

tasks.name: File Closure Documents
tasks.description: Verify required documents are added to the eFolder to close the file
tasks.notes: Applies to both closed and adverse loans. Each subtask auto-completes when the applicable document is added to the eFolder.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when a loan file is being closed, whether the outcome is a funded loan or an adverse action.

subtasks.name: Conversation Log
subtasks.description: Add the conversation log to the eFolder; auto-completes when the applicable document is added to the eFolder

subtasks.name: Disclosure Tracking
subtasks.description: Add the disclosure tracking document to the eFolder; auto-completes when the applicable document is added to the eFolder

subtasks.name: eConsent
subtasks.description: Add the eConsent document to the eFolder; auto-completes when the applicable document is added to the eFolder

subtasks.name: Initial Disclosures
subtasks.description: Initial Disclosures – Save the initial disclosure package; this subtask will auto-complete once the initial disclosure package is saved.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when initial disclosure package must be saved to file

subtasks.description: 1003 – Save a copy of the 1003; this subtask will auto-complete once the initial disclosure package is saved.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when 1003 copy must be saved to file

tasks.name: Cancel Flood Certificate
tasks.description: Cancel the flood certificate order for adverse loan files
tasks.notes: Adverse loans only. Cancel via the Xactus website.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when a loan file results in an adverse action and a flood certificate was previously ordered.

subtasks.name: Cancel Flood Certificate on Xactus Website
subtasks.description: Log into the Xactus website and cancel the flood certificate order for this loan

tasks.name: Appraisal Refund
tasks.description: Process appraisal fee refund for adverse loan files
tasks.notes: Adverse loans only. Refund check must be made payable to all borrowers on the loan. Fee must have been received at least 5 business days prior.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when a loan file results in an adverse action and an appraisal fee was collected.

subtasks.name: Confirm Appraisal Fee Received
subtasks.description: Verify appraisal fee was received at least 5 business days prior to allow sufficient time for payment processing before issuing refund

subtasks.name: Prepare Refund Check and Letter
subtasks.description: Prepare the appraisal refund check and accompanying refund letter; refund check must be made payable to all borrowers on the loan

subtasks.name: Scan Letter and Check to Loan File
subtasks.description: Scan the signed refund letter and authorized check to the loan file before mailing

subtasks.name: Mail Check
subtasks.description: Mail the refund check and letter to the borrower(s)

tasks.name: Order SSA-89
tasks.description: Request SSA-89 verification for Social Security income
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: borrower authorization, SSA-89 request submission, response review, income verification documentation. Only needed when borrower claims SS income.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied conditionally when borrower income includes Social Security benefits. Triggers when income type 'Social Security' is selected on application.

tasks.name: Order Tax Transcripts
tasks.description: Request IRS tax transcripts for income verification
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: 4506-C form completion, IRS transcript request (1040, W-2, 1099), transcript review, income verification against application, self-employed income analysis (if applicable)
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied for most loan types requiring income verification. Triggers after initial disclosures sent or when income documentation is needed. May be waived for certain automated underwriting approvals.

tasks.name: Order AVM
tasks.description: Order Automated Valuation Model through Xactus portal for property value assessment

subtasks.name: Order AVM in Xactus
subtasks.description: Submit AVM order through the Xactus portal for subject property

subtasks.name: Save AVM to eFolder
subtasks.description: Save the AVM document to the loan eFolder; if AVM hit is unsuccessful mark as issue to complete this task

subtasks.name: Enter AVM Data
subtasks.description: Enter property value and relevant data from AVM results into the loan file

subtasks.name: Ready to Send
subtasks.description: Loan is primed for initial document send; confirm all required items are in order before proceeding

tasks.name: Flood Certificate Review
tasks.description: Review flood certificate for accuracy against system data and verify life of loan coverage

subtasks.name: Address Matches System
subtasks.description: Address Matches System � Property address on flood certificate matches the address in the system; completing this task will copy the address to the flood order address checker to ensure accuracy in case of future address changes

subtasks.name: Flood Zone Matches System
subtasks.description: Flood Zone Matches System � Flood zone designation on certificate matches the zone recorded in the system

subtasks.name: Life of Loan Coverage Obtained
subtasks.description: Life of Loan Coverage Obtained � Life of loan flood zone monitoring coverage has been obtained

subtasks.name: Address Mismatch Detected
subtasks.description: Address Mismatch Detected � The property address on the flood certificate does not match the address in the system. Selecting Done will confirm that the discrepancy is a non-material variation and the certificate is acceptable as is. Selecting Issue will trigger a task to request an updated flood certificate reflecting the correct address.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when the property address on the flood certificate does not match the address in the system

tasks.name: Order PAR
tasks.description: Order Property Assessment Report through AppraisalX

subtasks.name: Place PAR Order
subtasks.description: Place PAR Order – Place an order for the Property Assessment Report under the AppraisalX platform

tasks.name: Recheck Flood
tasks.description: Recheck flood certificate for updated flood zone determination
tasks.notes: No subtasks. Applied when flood zone must be re-verified prior to closing.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied conditionally when flood zone determination needs to be updated before closing.

tasks.name: Pre-Underwriting Checklist
tasks.description: Pre-underwriting checklist — organize documents, verify income, assets, insurance, and employment before submitting to underwriting
tasks.notes: Unified pre-UW checklist for all loan types. Standard subtasks apply to every loan; conditional subtasks are assigned dynamically based on loan type. HELOCs skip AUS, assets, and employment but add Verify Purpose. First mortgages run AUS first to dictate doc requirements, then verify assets, employment, etc.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied for all loan types after borrower documents are returned and service orders are cleared.

subtasks.name: Organize eFolder
subtasks.description: Organize eFolder – Park documents from file manager into the eFolder and ensure all items are labeled correctly; documents returned from borrower must be categorized and filed before verification begins
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Run AUS
subtasks.description: Run AUS – Submit loan to Automated Underwriting System (DU/LP) and review findings; AUS findings dictate documentation requirements for the file
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added for first mortgage loans (purchase, refinance); not applicable to HELOCs which are manually underwritten

subtasks.name: Verify Income
subtasks.description: Verify Income – Verify borrower income documentation (paystubs, W-2s, tax docs) matches application and calculate qualifying income
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Verify Insurance
subtasks.description: Verify Insurance – Determine if homeowners insurance (HOI) is on file and ready for underwriting review; marking Done confirms HOI is available and triggers insurance review; mark Issue to generate a condition for missing or insufficient coverage
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Verify Mortgage Statements
subtasks.description: Verify Mortgage Statements – Verify current mortgage statements are on file showing existing loan balances, payments, and expenses that are part of the mortgage
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Verify Purpose
subtasks.description: Verify Purpose – Verify the stated purpose of the HELOC is documented in a Letter of Explanation (LOE) or conversation log; mark Issue to trigger a condition for missing purpose documentation
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added for HELOC loans only

subtasks.name: Verify Assets
subtasks.description: Verify Assets – Verify borrower assets and source of funds; review bank statements, verify account ownership, source large deposits, and calculate reserves
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added for first mortgage loans (purchase, refinance); not applicable to HELOCs

subtasks.name: Verify Employment
subtasks.description: Verify Employment – Verify borrower employment status and history; complete verbal or written verification of employment
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added for first mortgage loans (purchase, refinance)

subtasks.name: Self-Employed Income
subtasks.description: Self-Employed Income – Review tax returns (personal and business) and profit and loss statements for self-employed borrower income
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when borrower income type includes self-employment

subtasks.name: Non-Traditional Income
subtasks.description: Non-Traditional Income – Verify non-traditional income sources (Social Security, pension, disability) with award letters or other documentation
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when borrower has non-W-2 income sources (Social Security, pension, disability)

subtasks.name: Rental Income
subtasks.description: Rental Income – Verify rental income with lease agreements, tax returns, and rental history; calculate net rental income for qualifying purposes
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when borrower has rental income from investment properties

tasks.name: Order HOI
tasks.description: Order homeowners insurance policy for the subject property
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan receives conditional approval or clear to close. Triggers when loan is approved and property is identified.

subtasks.name: Request Insurance Declaration
subtasks.description: Request Insurance Declaration – Contact the borrower or insurance agent to obtain the homeowners insurance declaration page

tasks.name: HOI Review
tasks.description: Review homeowners insurance policy for coverage adequacy and lender requirements

subtasks.name: Verify Named Insured
subtasks.description: Verify Named Insured – All owners, including Name of Trust are listed on policy. See title report

subtasks.name: Verify Address
subtasks.description: Verify Address – Address listed matches subject and includes unit number if applicable

subtasks.name: Unit Number
subtasks.description: Unit Number – Unit number included if applicable

subtasks.name: Dwelling Coverage
subtasks.description: Dwelling Coverage – Dwelling coverage should cover the minimum of the loan amount or the cost to rebuild new appraisal

subtasks.name: Builders Risk
subtasks.description: Builders Risk – If the file is a construction loan, does the binder state that it is a Builders Risk include and Under Construction Endorsement

subtasks.name: Replacement Cost Value
subtasks.description: Replacement Cost Value – Coverage should equal lesser of 100% replacement cost value or unpaid balance provided it is not less than 80% of RCV

subtasks.name: Effective Date
subtasks.description: Effective Date – Effective date is not after closing date

subtasks.name: Policy Term
subtasks.description: Policy Term – Policy term has not expired and is in effect on date of closing

subtasks.name: Annual Premium
subtasks.description: Annual Premium – Annual premium needs to be listed and state whether or not it has been paid

subtasks.name: Deductible Amount
subtasks.description: Deductible Amount – Deductible amount may not exceed 5% of insurance coverage amount

subtasks.name: Mortgagee Clause
subtasks.description: Mortgagee Clause – If sold, follow investor mortgagee clause requirements

subtasks.name: Binder Signature
subtasks.description: Binder Signature – Binder must be signed

subtasks.name: Name of Trust
subtasks.description: Name of Trust – Name of Trust added in addition to all borrower(s) and owner(s)

tasks.name: Send Commitment Letter
tasks.description: Send loan commitment letter to borrower with conditions
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: generate commitment letter, document conditions, send to borrower, obtain borrower acknowledgment, set condition deadlines
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after underwriting approval with conditions. Triggers when loan receives conditional approval and borrower needs to be notified of approval terms.

subtasks.name: Send Commitment Letter
subtasks.description: Send Commitment Letter � Click Done to send the commitment letter electronically to the borrower; marking Done will trigger the electronic send

subtasks.name: Confirm Letter Sent
subtasks.description: Confirm Letter Sent � Confirm the commitment letter has been successfully sent to the borrower

subtasks.name: Save to eFolder
subtasks.description: Save to eFolder � Ensure the commitment letter is saved to the eFolder

tasks.name: Underwrite
tasks.description: Underwriter reviews submitted loan file and renders approval, denial, or counteroffer decision
tasks.notes: Task is triggered automatically when file is submitted to underwriting. Assigned to underwriter role. Approve subtask is auto-completed when underwriter approves in system. Deny/CounterOffer subtasks trigger their respective task flows (task_033 Deny Loan, task_034 CounterOffer). Return to Processor sends file back if not ready for a decision.
tasks.applicationLogic: Triggered automatically at submittal milestone. Assigned to underwriter for review.

subtasks.name: Approve
subtasks.description: Approve – Loan approved by underwriter; this subtask is auto-completed when the underwriter approves the loan in the system
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Deny
subtasks.description: Deny – Loan denied by underwriter; marking Done triggers the denial task flow
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: CounterOffer
subtasks.description: CounterOffer – Underwriter issues a counteroffer; marking Done triggers the counteroffer task flow
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Return to Processor
subtasks.description: Return to Processor – File is not ready for underwriting decision; marking Done sends the file back to the processor for additional documentation or corrections
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

tasks.name: Title (Ownership Report)
tasks.description: Review title ownership report for correct vesting, liens, judgments, and legal description
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied during underwriting resubmittal. Triggers when title commitment is received and underwriter requires title review or conditions.

subtasks.name: Customer Name & Property Address
subtasks.description: Customer Name & Property Address – Correct customer name and subject property address reflected on title report

subtasks.name: Vesting / Ownership
subtasks.description: Vesting / Ownership – Title vested in all loan borrowers; any additional owners not on the loan are identified and must be added as non-borrowing owners

subtasks.name: Deed Review
subtasks.description: Deed Review – Current deed matches vested owners; ownership aligns with borrowers and/or required non-borrowing owners

subtasks.name: Mortgages / Liens
subtasks.description: Mortgages / Liens – Mortgages shown are consistent with the loan application; any additional liens identified must be reviewed and cleared by underwriting

subtasks.name: Judgments
subtasks.description: Judgments – Title report reflects no outstanding judgments

subtasks.name: Legal Description
subtasks.description: Legal Description – Exhibit A is present

tasks.name: Review Appraisal
tasks.description: Review appraisal report and address underwriting conditions
tasks.notes: Transfer appraisal from ValueLink and send to borrower. CrossCheck results must be saved before marking complete.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied during underwriting resubmittal. Triggers when appraisal is received and underwriter requires appraisal review.

subtasks.name: Transfer Appraisal from Value Link
subtasks.description: Transfer Appraisal from Value Link – Transfer Appraisal from Value Link; save CrossCheck results in ValueLink prior to marking complete.

subtasks.name: External Review
subtasks.description: Document external review of appraisal. If external review was not completed, mark as Issue — triggers need for internal second review. Auto-completes when external review is confirmed completed.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included; mark Issue if external review not completed to trigger Second Review

subtasks.name: Second Review
subtasks.description: Document internal second review of appraisal. Added when external review was not completed.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added only when External Review subtask is marked as an Issue (external review not completed)

subtasks.name: Attach Appraisal Review Form
subtasks.description: Attach completed appraisal review form to the file. Added once second review is complete.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added once second review is complete

tasks.name: Send Appraisal
tasks.description: Send appraisal report to borrower
tasks.notes: Extracted from Review Appraisal (task_019) as a standalone task. Clicking Done sends appraisal and acknowledgement to borrower.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after appraisal is reviewed and ready for delivery to borrower.

subtasks.name: Send Appraisal
subtasks.description: Send appraisal to customer; ensure all documents are saved in the appraisal folder. Clicking Done will send the appraisal and acknowledgement to the borrower.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

tasks.name: Review Appraisal – Second Review
tasks.description: Internal second review of appraisal when no external review was completed
tasks.notes: Used when no external review was obtained. Separate standalone task from Review Appraisal (task_019).
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when an internal second review is required due to no external review being completed.

subtasks.name: Document Second Review
subtasks.description: Document findings of the internal second review of the appraisal. Confirm all review notes and findings are recorded before marking complete.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when task is created

subtasks.name: Attach Appraisal Review Form
subtasks.description: Attach completed appraisal review form to the file. Added once second review is complete.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added once second review is complete

tasks.name: Review Flood Insurance
tasks.description: Review flood insurance documentation and address underwriting conditions
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: verify flood zone determination, review flood insurance policy, verify coverage amounts, address underwriter conditions, confirm NFIP compliance
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied during underwriting resubmittal. Triggers when flood documentation is required by underwriter or property is in flood zone.

tasks.name: Review PAR
tasks.description: Review Property Assessment Report and address underwriting conditions
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied during underwriting resubmittal. Triggers when the PAR is received from AppraisalX and underwriter requires property assessment review.

subtasks.name: Address Verification
subtasks.description: Address Verification – Verify that the house number and street on the PAR match the loan file and property photos

subtasks.name: Visible Deferred Maintenance
subtasks.description: Visible Deferred Maintenance – Review PAR for any visible deferred maintenance issues noted on the property

subtasks.name: Occupancy Confirmation
subtasks.description: Occupancy Confirmation – Confirm the occupancy status of the property as reported in the PAR

subtasks.name: Repair Costs
subtasks.description: Repair Costs – Review and document any repair costs noted in the PAR

tasks.name: Clear to Close
tasks.description: Obtain final clear to close approval from underwriter
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: verify all conditions cleared, final underwriting review, obtain CTC approval, send CTC notification, prepare for closing
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after all underwriting conditions are cleared. Triggers when final documentation is complete and underwriter is ready to issue clear to close.

tasks.name: Master Property Insurance Review
tasks.description: Review condominium or project master property insurance for FNMA compliance and determine if HO6 review is required.
tasks.notes: Assigned to Underwriter. Per-Unit Deductible Amount is conditional (only if per-unit deductible exists). Mortgagee Clause is conditional (investor/insurer guidelines). Triggers HO6 Policy Review if per-unit deductible or interior coverage gap found.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied during underwriting post-underwriting for condo or project loans. Triggers when a master property insurance policy must be reviewed for FNMA compliance.

subtasks.name: Project Insured Confirmation
subtasks.description: Project Insured Confirmation – Confirm the master property insurance policy insures the subject condominium or project development.

subtasks.name: Unit Within Project Confirmation
subtasks.description: Unit Within Project Confirmation – Confirm the subject unit is located within the insured project development shown on the master policy.

subtasks.name: Policy Effective Before Closing
subtasks.description: Policy Effective Before Closing – Confirm the master policy effective date is on or before the loan closing.

subtasks.name: Policy Active at Closing
subtasks.description: Policy Active at Closing – Confirm the master policy term is active and not expired as of the loan closing date.

subtasks.name: Replacement Cost Coverage Sufficiency
subtasks.description: Replacement Cost Coverage Sufficiency – Confirm the master policy coverage equals at least 100% of the estimated replacement cost value of project improvements, including common elements and residential structures.

subtasks.name: Coverage Documentation Present
subtasks.description: Coverage Documentation Present – Confirm the file contains acceptable documentation supporting master policy coverage sufficiency. Mark Issue to trigger Insurance Documentation Condition.

subtasks.name: Replacement Cost Loss Settlement
subtasks.description: Replacement Cost Loss Settlement – Confirm the master policy provides replacement cost coverage for required building and property coverage, except roofs.

subtasks.name: Roof Coverage Confirmation
subtasks.description: Roof Coverage Confirmation – Confirm roofs are insured under the master policy, even if not insured on a replacement cost basis.

subtasks.name: ACV Language Review
subtasks.description: ACV Language Review – If actual cash value language is present, confirm ACV treatment is limited to personal property or specific elements and does not reduce required building coverage below FNMA standards.

subtasks.name: Master Policy Deductible Review
subtasks.description: Master Policy Deductible Review – Confirm the deductible for all required property insurance perils does not exceed 5% of the total master property coverage amount.

subtasks.name: Per-Unit Deductible Exists
subtasks.description: Per-Unit Deductible Exists – Determine whether the master policy includes a per-unit deductible. If exists, mark Issue to trigger HO6 Policy Review task.

subtasks.name: Per-Unit Deductible Amount Review
subtasks.description: Per-Unit Deductible Amount Review – If a per-unit deductible exists, confirm the amount does not exceed $50,000 per unit.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added only if a per-unit deductible exists on the master policy

subtasks.name: Interior Coverage Gap
subtasks.description: Interior Coverage Gap – Determine whether any portion of the interior of the unit or unit improvements are not covered by the master policy. If gap exists, mark Issue to trigger HO6 Policy Review task.

subtasks.name: Mortgagee Clause Review
subtasks.description: Mortgagee Clause Review – Review mortgagee clause requirements based on investor, insurer, or internal policy guidelines, if applicable.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when investor, insurer, or internal policy guidelines require a mortgagee clause review

tasks.name: Deny Loan
tasks.description: Process loan denial and send adverse action notice
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: prepare denial letter, document denial reasons, send adverse action notice, provide FCRA disclosures, close loan file
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when loan is denied by underwriter. Triggers when underwriting determines loan does not meet approval criteria.

tasks.name: Send Counteroffer
tasks.description: Send counteroffer notice to borrower with revised loan terms
tasks.notes: Triggered when underwriter issues a counteroffer. MA first-position purchase/refi loans require the MA Review Board form and must be mailed; all other loans send electronically with documents in the Counteroffer eFolder.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied when underwriter provides alternative loan terms. Triggers when loan doesn't meet original criteria but alternative terms are available.

subtasks.name: MA Review Form Board Required
subtasks.description: Complete and include the Massachusetts Review Board form; required for MA first-position purchase or refinance loans before sending counteroffer
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property is in MA AND loan is first position AND loan purpose is purchase or refinance

subtasks.name: Send Counteroffer Electronically
subtasks.description: Send counteroffer to borrower electronically; ensure all required documents are saved in the Counteroffer eFolder document before sending
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when NOT (MA AND first position AND purchase or refinance)

subtasks.name: Mail Counteroffer
subtasks.description: Mail the counteroffer package to the borrower; required for MA first-position purchase or refinance loans in lieu of electronic delivery
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when property is in MA AND loan is first position AND loan purpose is purchase or refinance

tasks.name: Scheduling
tasks.description: Obtain closing date and time from branch
tasks.notes: Single subtask: obtain closing date and time from branch.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after clear to close is received. Triggers when loan is approved and ready for closing coordination.

subtasks.name: Obtain Closing Date and Time from Branch
subtasks.description: Contact the branch to obtain the confirmed closing date and time for this loan

tasks.name: Send Initial CD
tasks.description: Send initial Closing Disclosure to borrower
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: generate initial CD, review CD accuracy, send to borrower, obtain borrower acknowledgment, start 3-day waiting period
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied at least 3 business days before closing. Triggers when final loan terms are confirmed and clear to close is issued.

tasks.name: Balance CD
tasks.description: Balance Closing Disclosure with final figures
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: verify all fees, reconcile with LE, confirm payoff amounts, verify closing funds, finalize CD
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied 1-2 days before closing. Triggers when final payoff statements and closing figures are received.

tasks.name: Create Closing Package
tasks.description: Prepare and send complete closing document package
tasks.notes: Single subtask: create closing package.
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied 1 day before closing. Triggers after CD is balanced and all closing conditions are cleared.

subtasks.name: Create Closing Package
subtasks.description: Generate and assemble the complete closing document package for this loan

tasks.name: Confirm Funding Figures
tasks.description: Confirm all funding figures and wire amounts
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: verify final CD, confirm wire amounts, verify disbursements, review funding worksheet, obtain final approvals
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after closing documents are signed. Triggers when closing is complete and ready for funding.

tasks.name: Approve Funding Figures
tasks.description: Obtain approval for funding figures
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: submit for approval, obtain department head approval, verify investor approval, final compliance review, authorize funding
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after funding figures are confirmed. Triggers when all figures are verified and ready for final approval.

tasks.name: Fund Loan
tasks.description: Execute funding and wire transfer
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: initiate wire transfer, confirm funds received by title, record funding date/time, update loan status, send funding notifications
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after funding is approved. Triggers when final approval is received and within funding deadline.

tasks.name: Board Loan
tasks.description: Board loan into servicing system
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: prepare boarding package, submit to servicing, verify loan setup, confirm payment schedule, verify escrow setup
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan is funded. Triggers when funding is complete and loan needs to be set up for servicing.

tasks.name: Run UCD
tasks.description: Run Uniform Closing Dataset (UCD) validation
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: generate UCD file, validate UCD data, submit to investor, address validation errors, confirm acceptance
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan is boarded. Triggers when loan is set up in servicing and ready for UCD submission.

tasks.name: Activate MERS
tasks.description: Activate loan in MERS (Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems)
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: register loan in MERS, verify MERS MIN, update servicer information, confirm registration, generate MERS confirmation
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan is boarded. Triggers when loan setup is complete and MERS registration is required.

tasks.name: Activate MI
tasks.description: Activate mortgage insurance policy
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: submit loan to MI company, verify MI certificate, activate policy, confirm coverage, set up MI billing
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied conditionally after loan is boarded. Triggers when loan has mortgage insurance and policy needs activation.

tasks.name: Credit Refresh
tasks.description: Pull updated credit report before closing
tasks.notes: Pre-closing quality control task
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied within 5 days before closing. Triggers automatically based on closing date or when Clear to Close is issued.

subtasks.name: Red Flags Review
subtasks.description: Review refreshed credit report for red flags
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when credit refresh task is created

subtasks.name: Inquiries/New Credit Review
subtasks.description: Review new credit inquiries and accounts since initial pull
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when credit refresh task is created

tasks.name: Fraud X Report
tasks.description: Run fraud detection report
tasks.notes: Fraud detection and verification
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied before final approval. Triggers when loan is in underwriting review or before Clear to Close.

subtasks.name: Appraiser License
subtasks.description: Verify appraiser license on Fraud X report. If not successfully verified, license must be saved to the file before completing.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added only when an appraisal was obtained on the loan

subtasks.name: Red Flags
subtasks.description: Review Fraud X report for red flags including Address, Name, SSN discrepancies and OFAC hits. Review summary grid for overall indications. Mark as Issue and notify management if found.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when fraud report task is created

subtasks.name: All Borrowers
subtasks.description: Verify all borrowers are present on the Fraud X report with no unresolved discrepancies.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Always included when fraud report task is created

subtasks.name: Non-Borrowing Owners
subtasks.description: Verify all non-borrowing owners are present on the Fraud X report with no unresolved discrepancies.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added only if non-borrowing owners are present on the loan

subtasks.name: Buyer Agent
subtasks.description: Verify the buyer's agent is present on the Fraud X report with no unresolved discrepancies.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added only for purchase transactions

subtasks.name: Seller Agent
subtasks.description: Verify the seller's agent is present on the Fraud X report with no unresolved discrepancies.
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added only for purchase transactions

subcategories.name: Quality Assurance
subcategories.description: Initial and post-closing document quality assurance reviews

tasks.name: Deliver Note
tasks.description: Deliver promissory note to appropriate party
tasks.notes: Deliver note based on loan disposition - secondary market or portfolio
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan closing and funding. Triggers when closing documents are executed and note needs to be delivered.

subtasks.name: Deliver to Secondary
subtasks.description: Deliver note to secondary market investor
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when loan is sold to secondary market

subtasks.name: Deliver to Operations
subtasks.description: Deliver note to operations for portfolio retention
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when loan is retained in portfolio

tasks.name: Record Mortgage
tasks.description: Record mortgage at registry of deeds
tasks.notes: Required for equity loans and MassHousing second mortgages
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied conditionally after closing. Triggers when loan type is home equity or MassHousing second mortgage requiring recording.

tasks.name: Deliver Mortgage
tasks.description: Deliver recorded mortgage to appropriate party
tasks.notes: Deliver mortgage based on loan disposition - secondary market or portfolio
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after mortgage is recorded (if applicable) or closing is complete. Triggers when mortgage document needs to be delivered.

subtasks.name: Deliver to Secondary
subtasks.description: Deliver mortgage to secondary market investor
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when loan is sold to secondary market

subtasks.name: Deliver to Operations
subtasks.description: Deliver mortgage to operations for portfolio retention
subtasks.applicationLogic: Added when loan is retained in portfolio

tasks.name: Image Documents
tasks.description: Image and upload paper documents to Encompass
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: scan paper documents, review image quality, upload to Encompass eFolder, verify document indexing, dispose of paper per retention policy
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after closing when paper documents are received. Triggers when physical closing packages are returned and need to be digitized.

tasks.name: eFolder Cleanup
tasks.description: Clean up and organize eFolder in Encompass
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: remove duplicate documents, verify all documents properly indexed, organize folder structure, remove temporary/draft documents, final quality review
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after all post-closing documents are received and imaged. Triggers when loan file is ready for final organization before archival.

tasks.name: Transfer to Cold Storage
tasks.description: Transfer completed loan file to cold storage/archive
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: verify file completeness, export final loan package, transfer to archive system, verify successful transfer, update loan status to archived
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after eFolder cleanup is complete. Triggers when loan file is finalized and ready for long-term storage per retention requirements.

tasks.name: Transfer to SaaS
tasks.description: Transfer loan data to HMDA reporting SaaS platform
tasks.notes: Subtasks needed: verify HMDA data accuracy, export loan data, upload to HMDA SaaS system, validate data transfer, confirm successful import
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after loan closing for HMDA reportable loans. Triggers when loan needs to be reported for Home Mortgage Disclosure Act compliance.

tasks.name: Initial Document Quality Assurance
tasks.description: Review initial disclosure documents for compliance and completeness
tasks.notes: Covers 1003 review, eConsent, all state-specific disclosures (MA, RI), and conditional items (HELOC, ARM, ROV)
tasks.applicationLogic: Applied after initial disclosures are sent. Reviews all required and conditional initial documents for completeness and compliance.

subtasks.name: 1003 � Declarations Complete
subtasks.description: 1003 � Declarations Complete � 1003 returned for all borrowers

subtasks.name: 1003 � Demographic Info Addendum
subtasks.description: 1003 � Demographic Info Addendum � Demographic Information Addendum collected

subtasks.name: 1003 � Demographic Info Addendum Signed
subtasks.description: 1003 � Demographic Info Addendum Signed � Demographic Information Addendum not collected; not marked on 1003

subtasks.name: 1003 � Demographic HELOC
subtasks.description: 1003 � Demographic HELOC � Demographic information is collected only when the proceeds are used to pay off an existing lien-secured debt, qualifying the transaction as a refinancing for regulatory reporting purposes.

subtasks.name: ROV Sent with Initial Disclosures
subtasks.description: ROV Sent with Initial Disclosures � Right to Request Reconsideration of Value sent with initial disclosures

subtasks.name: eConsent � Completed Prior to Electronic Send
subtasks.description: eConsent � Completed Prior to Electronic Send � eConsent completed before electronically sending disclosures

subtasks.name: eConsent � Docs Mailed if No eConsent
subtasks.description: eConsent � Docs Mailed if No eConsent � If no eConsent, documents mailed prior to disclosure due date

subtasks.name: Supplemental Consumer Information Form
subtasks.description: Supplemental Consumer Information Form � One Supplemental Consumer Information Form per URLA

subtasks.name: HELOC Important Terms Disclosure
subtasks.description: HELOC Important Terms Disclosure � HELOC Important Terms Disclosure provided

subtasks.name: Your Home Loan Toolkit
subtasks.description: Your Home Loan Toolkit � Provided within 3 business days of application

subtasks.name: 2015 Settlement Service List
subtasks.description: 2015 Settlement Service List � Provided

subtasks.name: Acknowledgement of Intent to Proceed
subtasks.description: Acknowledgement of Intent to Proceed � Acknowledgement of Intent to Proceed obtained; date entered matches date on form

subtasks.name: CHARM Booklet
subtasks.description: CHARM Booklet � CHARM Booklet provided within 3 business days

subtasks.name: ARM Disclosure
subtasks.description: ARM Disclosure � ARM Disclosure sent same day as application; matches product and index as of day sent

subtasks.name: Credit Score Disclosure Completed
subtasks.description: Credit Score Disclosure Completed � Information is complete and matches credit report with all scores present

subtasks.name: Homeowner Counseling List and Acknowledgement
subtasks.description: Homeowner Counseling List and Acknowledgement � 10 counselors provided based on borrower's address

subtasks.name: Notice of Right to Copy of Appraisal (ECOA)
subtasks.description: Notice of Right to Copy of Appraisal (ECOA) � Notice of Right to Copy of Appraisal (ECOA) provided

subtasks.name: Privacy Notice Received
subtasks.description: Privacy Notice Received � Privacy Notice provided and saved in folder

subtasks.name: Privacy Policy � Opt Out Signed
subtasks.description: Privacy Policy � Opt Out Signed � Opt Out signed (if applicable)

subtasks.name: RI Appraisal Fee Notice
subtasks.description: RI Appraisal Fee Notice � RI Appraisal Fee Notice provided

subtasks.name: RI Right to Copy of Appraisal
subtasks.description: RI Right to Copy of Appraisal � RI Right to Copy of Appraisal provided

subtasks.name: RI Notice of Non-Refundability
subtasks.description: RI Notice of Non-Refundability � RI Notice of Non-Refundability provided

subtasks.name: RI Form 1
subtasks.description: RI Form 1 � RI Form 1 completed and signed by Loan Originator

subtasks.name: RI Form 2
subtasks.description: RI Form 2 � RI Form 2 completed and signed by Loan Originator

subtasks.name: RI Open-End Credit Disclosures
subtasks.description: RI Open-End Credit Disclosures � RI Open-End Credit Disclosures (Gen Laws 6-27-11, O/OC Only)

subtasks.name: RI Choice of Insurance
subtasks.description: RI Choice of Insurance � RI Choice of Insurance provided

subtasks.name: RI Title Insurance Disclosure
subtasks.description: RI Title Insurance Disclosure � RI Title Insurance Disclosure executed with all boxes checked

subtasks.name: USA Patriot Act Info Disclosure
subtasks.description: USA Patriot Act Info Disclosure � USA Patriot Act Info Disclosure provided

subtasks.name: HELOC Booklet
subtasks.description: HELOC Booklet � HELOC Booklet provided within 3 business days

activityLog.details: Created send_commitment_letter_v1.xml with 3 subtasks: Send Commitment Letter, Confirm Letter Sent, Save to eFolder

activityLog.author: system
activityLog.details: Created unified pre_uw_checklist_v1.xml with 11 subtasks: Organize eFolder (standard), Run AUS (conditional — first mortgages only, rank 2 to dictate doc requirements), Verify Income (standard), Verify Insurance (standard), Verify Mortgage Statements (standard), Verify Purpose (conditional — HELOCs only), Verify Assets (conditional — first mortgages only), Verify Employment (conditional — first mortgages), Self-Employed Income (conditional), Non-Traditional Income (conditional), Rental Income (conditional). Consolidated from separate HELOC and first mortgage tasks into one unified checklist. Removed task_011 (Run AUS), task_012 (Organize eFolder), task_013 (Verify Assets), task_014 (Verify Income), and task_049 (Pre-UW Checklist First Mortgage) as standalone tasks.

activityLog.author: system
activityLog.details: Created underwrite_v1.xml with 4 subtasks: Approve (standard — auto-completed when UW approves in system), Deny (standard — triggers denial task flow), CounterOffer (standard — triggers counteroffer task flow), Return to Processor (standard — sends file back to processor if not ready for decision). Task is assigned to Underwriter role and triggered automatically at submittal milestone.

activityLog.author: system
activityLog.details: Cleaned up existing Credit Score Disclosure from example file. Fixed subtask names from 'Sub-Task Name' to proper names (FACT Act All Scores, FACT Act Checkboxes, FACT Act Key Factors, eConsent, Contact Info, Ready to Send), added description prefixes, removed forbidden taskTemplateId from subtasks, added Disclosures task group, updated type to Processing_Disclosures_CreditScoreDisclosure, added Loan Processor assignee. Moved from dislosures/ to credit_score_disclosure/ directory. 6 standard subtasks.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Created review_par_v1.xml with 4 subtasks: Address Verification (standard), Visible Deferred Maintenance (standard), Occupancy Confirmation (standard), Repair Costs (standard). Task is under Underwriting Resubmittal for reviewing the Property Assessment Report received from AppraisalX.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Created file_closure_documents_v1.xml with 3 standard subtasks: Conversation Log, Disclosure Tracking, eConsent. Each subtask auto-completes when the applicable document is added to the eFolder. Applies to both funded and adverse loan file closures.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Created cancel_flood_certificate_v1.xml with 1 standard subtask: Cancel Flood Certificate on Xactus Website. Adverse loans only.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Created appraisal_refund_v1.xml with 4 standard subtasks: Confirm Appraisal Fee Received, Prepare Refund Check and Letter, Scan Letter and Check to Loan File, Mail Check. Adverse loans only. Refund made payable to all borrowers.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Created review_appraisal_v1.xml from import. 2 standard subtasks: Transfer Appraisal from Value Link (save CrossCheck in ValueLink before completing), Send Appraisal (clicking Done sends appraisal + acknowledgement to borrower). Underwriting Resubmittal stage.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Updated review_appraisal_v1.xml: removed Send Appraisal subtask (extracted to task_057); added External Review (standard – mark Issue if not completed, auto-completes when external review confirmed); added Second Review (conditional – added when External Review marked as Issue).

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Created send_appraisal_v1.xml as standalone task extracted from Review Appraisal (task_019). 1 standard subtask: Send Appraisal (clicking Done sends appraisal and acknowledgement to borrower). Underwriting Resubmittal stage.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Added Attach Appraisal Review Form (conditional – added once second review is complete) as rank 4 subtask.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Created review_appraisal_second_review_v1.xml as standalone task for loans without an external review. 2 subtasks: Document Second Review (standard), Attach Appraisal Review Form (conditional – added once second review is complete). Underwriting Resubmittal stage.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Added 2 conditional subtasks from import: Initial Disclosures (rank 4, autoCreate=false — save initial disclosure package) and 1003 (rank 5, autoCreate=false — save copy of 1003). Total subtasks now 5.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Created recheck_flood_v1.xml from import. No subtasks. Processing / Service Orders. Assigned to Loan Processor.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Created master_property_insurance_review_v1.xml from import. 14 subtasks: Project Insured Confirmation, Unit Within Project Confirmation, Policy Effective Before Closing, Policy Active at Closing, Replacement Cost Coverage Sufficiency, Coverage Documentation Present, Replacement Cost Loss Settlement, Roof Coverage Confirmation, ACV Language Review, Master Policy Deductible Review, Per-Unit Deductible Exists, Per-Unit Deductible Amount Review (conditional), Interior Coverage Gap, Mortgagee Clause Review (conditional). Assigned to Underwriter. Underwriting / Post-Underwriting.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Created send_counteroffer_v1.xml with 3 conditional subtasks: MA Review Form Board Required (conditional — MA + first position + purchase or refi), Send Counteroffer Electronically (conditional — NOT MA/first position/purchase or refi; documents must be in Counteroffer eFolder), Mail Counteroffer (conditional — MA + first position + purchase or refi). Underwriting / Misc stage. Assigned to Loan Processor.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Created scheduling_v1.xml. 1 standard subtask: Obtain Closing Date and Time from Branch. Closing / Pre-Closing stage. Assigned to Loan Processor.

activityLog.author: agent_claude
activityLog.details: Created create_closing_package_v1.xml. 1 standard subtask: Create Closing Package. Closing / Doc Prep stage. Assigned to Loan Processor.
